name: agent-booster-pack
description_en: Agent Booster Pack for Pi: skills + Interface Design Gate runtime + proof-first runtime + whiteboarding guard + final value guard, in one install. Meta-package; depends on the four siblings.
description_zh: Pi 的代理增强包：技能 + 接口设计门运行时 + 优先证明运行时 + 白板守卫 + 最终值守卫，一次安装。元包；依赖于四个兄弟包。
